title: List Node
content:
# List Node

Returns a list of Node objects in a Cluster. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.

## Endpoint

`GET /orchestration/clusters/{cluster_name}/nodes/list`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.orchestration.listOrchestrationClustersNode()
print(response)

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: Cluster key `name` containing the Nodes to list. The filter is on the full name only. Can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search and filter on the list based on the Node `name`. The search is case insensitive and will find partial matches as well.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the Node key `status`. The filter is on the full name only. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. Options are `online`, `unreachable` and `not_ready`

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort the results by one of the Cluster parameters. Only one parameter can be selected. Options: `id`, `name`, `status`, `last_seen`, `created` and `updated`.
